description: Prints a formatted table of all registered proprietary-cli commands.

columns.name: routeKey
columns.description: The routing key used by the CLI to invoke the command.

columns.name: file
columns.description: Relative file path of the command implementation.

additionalCommands.description: Integrates Seven‑OS manifest routes with proprietary-cli commands and reports alignment.

outputs.aligned: Routes present in both manifest and CLI
outputs.missingInCLI: Routes present in manifest but not implemented in CLI
outputs.extraInCLI: Routes implemented in CLI but not declared in manifest
